title: BEM-852 writer placement
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['.github/workflows','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 11:48 (UTC+3)'
wf=Path('.github/workflows/claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml')
text=wf.read_text(errors='ignore') if wf.exists() else ''
changed=False
# Make ensure step unconditional on active_check so a dispatcher run always leaves a response file/state when invoked.
old="if: steps.active_check.outputs.active == 'true' && always()"
if old in text and 'Ensure Claude response file exists' in text:
    text=text.replace(old, 'if: always()')
    changed=True
# If ensure step absent, append before commit state.
if 'scripts/ensure_claude_response_file.py' not in text:
    insert='''\n      - name: Ensure Claude response file exists\n        if: always()\n        env:\n          CLAUDE_OUTCOME: ${{ steps.claude_response.outcome }}\n        run: python3 scripts/ensure_claude_response_file.py "$CLAUDE_OUTCOME"\n'''
    marker='      - name: Commit dispatcher state'
    if marker in text:
        text=text.replace(marker, insert+marker, 1)
    else:
        text=text+insert
    changed=True
if wf.exists():
    wf.write_text(text)
# Queue dispatcher after placement fix.
q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem852_writer_placement_dispatch.json')
q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v15','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-852 dispatch after making ensure response step unconditional','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state={'bem':'BEM-852','status':'writer_placement_patched_and_dispatch_queued','workflow_exists':wf.exists(),'workflow_changed':changed,'queue_file':str(q),'next_action':'fresh tick then verify bem844_claude_response.md','created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem852_inspect_and_patch_writer_placement.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem852_inspect_and_patch_writer_placement.md').write_text('# BEM-852 | Inspect And Patch Writer Placement | PATCHED'+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem852_next.md').write_text('Next: fresh tick and verify bem844_claude_response.md. Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-852'+sep+sep+'Status: writer_placement_patched_and_dispatch_queued'+sep+'Next: tick and verify response.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem852_inspect_and_patch_writer_placement.json','governance/reports/bem852_inspect_and_patch_writer_placement.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem852_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl',str(q),str(wf)])
ops_applied.append('Patched Claude dispatcher fail-closed writer placement to run with if: always(), then queued dispatcher retry')
"""
No issue comments.
